why: Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound minecraft:reset_chat must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and empty body generated by the oracle answer. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for the official singleton empty-body packet only, not chat UI reset behavior, screen flow, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, or runtime behavior.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 6, official empty body bytes) because the current Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound table has no mapping for packet id 0x06.
stop_condition: The exact Rust oracle test passes, then bash oracle/scripts/run_jar_backed_oracle_tests.sh passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts.
